---
species: "Eumicrotremus spinosus"
accepted_code: "EUSP"
alternate_codes: ""
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ""
common_name: "Spiny lumpsucker"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "<15cm with body covered in irregular tubercles and pevlic fins evolved into suction cup-like disc"
image: '/header_images/Eumicrotremus_spinosus.png'
image_credit: 'Photo by Andrew Martinez via [REEF](https://www.reef.org/news/enews/making-it-count-march-2021/fish-month-march-2021)'
categories:
  - fish
sampling_programs:
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - mobile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: "127217"
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** 
<!-- size, gross morphology, a key identifier, zonation notes (intertidal or depth) -->
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

<!-- link to worms page -->
